promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the AB-discriminator A2-mid batch deferred the mutual-information baseline pair.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: baseline pair identity, local kill-gate versus stored-output escape, local evidence without repo-top admission, tiny negativity tail under robust MI, and inversion against the larger next-family stress sweep.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The AB A2-mid batch provides the immediately preceding residual-pair shell, the non-AB A2-mid batch provides the compact-result caution style, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the adjacent stress sweep must stay comparison-only in this bounded baseline pass and begin the next family.
Not selected because it would erase the baseline-versus-search-family boundary preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent paired-family batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable baseline-shell, kill-gate, evidence-status, negativity-tail, and stress-boundary packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_MUTUALINFO_BASELINE_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the mutual-information baseline residual pair.

candidate_items.name: KILL_GATE_VS_STORED_NEGATIVITY_ESCAPE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest gate-versus-outcome seam.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_BASELINE_EVIDENCE_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's main visibility contradiction for the baseline family.

candidate_items.name: POSITIVE_MI_WITH_TINY_NEGATIVITY_TAIL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest anti-collapse packet between strong MI and fragile negativity evidence.

candidate_items.name: BASELINE_OVER_STRESS_SWEEP_NEGATIVITY_INVERSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-supersession comparison packet against the larger stress sweep.

candidate_items.name: COMPACT_BASELINE_GRANULARITY_LIMIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest granularity caution packet.

quarantined_items.name: KILL_GATE_PRESENCE_AS_KILL_TRIGGER
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The runner contains the kill gate, but the stored output does not trigger it because the negativity fraction is nonzero.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE_OR_KILL_TOKEN_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Local evidence emission and local kill logic are both weaker than repo-top evidence admission.

quarantined_items.name: POSITIVE_MI_AS_ROBUST_NEGATIVITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Robustly positive MI is weaker than the stronger negativity-oriented claim, which survives here only as a one-in-512 tail.

quarantined_items.name: STRESS_SWEEP_AS_AUTOMATIC_BASELINE_SUPERSESSOR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The larger stress sweep stores best negativity score zero and therefore does not automatically supersede the baseline's tiny nonzero negativity tail.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_BASELINE_SUMMARY_AS_TRIAL_LEVEL_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The stored output preserves only means, extrema, and one negativity fraction rather than trial-level detail.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the mutual-information baseline batch without reopening raw sims files.
They keep family identity, local-only evidence status, kill-gate logic, tiny negativity evidence, and the stress-family comparison boundary distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain gate-overreads, evidence-admission overreads, negativity-overreads, supersession-overreads, or granularity overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
